CustomField.inlineHelpText: Request headers the notifier sent, serialized as one Key: value per line. Apex HttpRequest has no getHeaderKeys(), so the runtime relies on the notifier to enumerate what it set - every header the notifier hands forward ends up here, including auth headers like Authorization or X-Api-Key. If you need to restrict which headers get captured, set up an admin-facing allowlist on LoggerNotificationService__c (see the plugin backlog for the design).
CustomField.label: Request Headers
